400.description: Invalid argument - The client specified an invalid argument

401.description: Unauthenticated - The request does not have valid authentication credentials

403.description: Permission denied - The caller does not have permission to execute the specified operation

404.description: Not found - Some requested entity was not found

408.description: Deadline exceeded - The deadline expired before the operation could complete

409.description: Aborted - The operation was aborted due to concurrency issue

412.description: Failed precondition - Operation was rejected because the system is not in required state

413.description: Out of range - Operation was attempted past the valid range

429.description: Resource exhausted - Some resource has been exhausted (rate limiting)

431.description: Request header fields too large - Request metadata was too large

499.description: Cancelled - The operation was cancelled by the client

501.description: Unimplemented - The operation is not implemented or supported

503.description: Unavailable - The service is currently unavailable

504.description: Deadline exceeded - Upstream service did not respond in time

example.name: My First Agent
example.system: You are a general-purpose agent that can research, write code, run commands, and use connected tools to complete the user's task end to end.

description.description: Description of what the agent does. Up to 2048 characters.

mcp_servers.description: MCP servers this agent connects to. Maximum 20. Names must be unique within the array.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata. Maximum 16 pairs, keys up to 64 chars, values up to 512 chars.

model.description: Model identifier. Accepts the [model string](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/about-claude/models/overview#latest-models-comparison), e.g. `claude-opus-4-6`, or a `model_config` object for additional configuration control

name.description: Human-readable name for the agent. 1-256 characters.

skills.description: Skills available to the agent. Maximum 20.

system.description: System prompt for the agent. Up to 100,000 characters.
examples: You are a general-purpose agent that can research, write code, run commands, and use connected tools to complete the user's task end to end.

tools.description: Tool configurations available to the agent. Maximum of 128 tools across all toolsets allowed.

example.name: My First Agent
example.system: You are a general-purpose agent that can research, write code, run commands, and use connected tools to complete the user's task end to end.

archived_at.description: When the agent was archived. Null if not archived.

examples: You are a general-purpose agent that can research, write code, run commands, and use connected tools to complete the user's task end to end.

version.description: The agent's current version. Starts at 1 and increments when the agent is modified.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPServerParams.description: Union type for MCP server connection definitions.

BetaManagedAgentsSkillParams.description: Skill to load in the session container.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolParams.description: Union type for tool configurations in the tools array.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPServer.description: Union type for MCP server connection definitions returned in API responses.

speed.description: Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Defaults to `standard`. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

BetaManagedAgentsSkill.description: Resolved skill as returned in API responses.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentTool.description: Union type for tool configurations returned in API responses.

name.description: Unique name for this server, referenced by mcp_toolset configurations. 1-255 characters.

url.description: Endpoint URL for the MCP server.

Most intelligent model for building agents and coding
Best combination of speed and intelligence
Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

BetaManagedAgentsModel.description: The model that will power your agent.\n\nSee [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.
BetaManagedAgentsModel.title: BetaManagedAgentsModel

BetaManagedAgentsModelConfigParams.description: An object that defines additional configuration control over model use

version.description: Version to pin. Defaults to latest if omitted.

skill_id.description: Tagged ID of the custom skill (e.g., "skill_01XJ5...").

version.description: Version to pin. Defaults to latest if omitted.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolset20260401Par.description: Configuration for built-in agent tools. Use this to enable or disable groups of tools available to the agent.

default_config.description: Default configuration applied to all tools in this set.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetParams.description: Configuration for tools from an MCP server defined in `mcp_servers`.

default_config.description: Default configuration for all tools from this server.

mcp_server_name.description: Name of the MCP server. Must match a server name from the mcp_servers array. 1-255 characters.

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolParams.description: A custom tool that is executed by the API client rather than the agent. When the agent calls this tool, an `agent.custom_tool_use` event is emitted and the session goes idle, waiting for the client to provide the result via a `user.custom_tool_result` event.

description.description: Description of what the tool does, shown to the agent to help it decide when to use the tool. 1-1024 characters.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema defining the expected input parameters for the tool.

name.description: Unique name for the tool. 1-128 characters; letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPServerURLDefinition.description: URL-based MCP server connection as returned in API responses.

BetaManagedAgentsSpeed.description: Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

BetaManagedAgentsCustomTool.description: A custom tool as returned in API responses.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolConfigParams.description: Configuration override for a specific tool within a toolset.

enabled.description: Whether this tool is enabled and available to Claude. Overrides the default_config setting.

permission_policy.description: Permission policy for this tool. Controls whether tool calls are auto-approved or require confirmation.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolsetDefaultConf.description: Default configuration for all tools in a toolset.

enabled.description: Whether tools are enabled and available to Claude by default. Defaults to true if not specified.

permission_policy.description: Default permission policy for tools. Controls whether tool calls are auto-approved or require confirmation.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolConfigParams.description: Configuration override for a specific MCP tool.

enabled.description: Whether this tool is enabled. Overrides the `default_config` setting.

name.description: Name of the MCP tool to configure. 1-128 characters.

permission_policy.description: Permission policy for this tool. Overrides the `default_config` setting.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetDefaultConfig.description: Default configuration for all tools from an MCP server.

enabled.description: Whether tools are enabled by default. Defaults to true if not specified.

permission_policy.description: Default permission policy for tools from this server.

BetaManagedAgentsCustomToolInputSchema.description: JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

properties.description: JSON Schema properties defining the tool's input parameters.

type.description: Must be 'object' for tool input schemas.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolConfig.description: Configuration for a specific agent tool.

BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolsetDefaultConf.description: Resolved default configuration for agent tools.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolConfig.description: Resolved configuration for a specific MCP tool.

BetaManagedAgentsMCPToolsetDefaultConfig.description: Resolved default configuration for all tools from an MCP server.

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy.description: Tool calls are automatically approved without user confirmation.

BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy.description: Tool calls require user confirmation before execution.
